note: Mathlib/Algebra/QuadraticDiscriminant.lean:84 — theorem quadratic_eq_zero_iff (ha : a ≠ 0) (h : discrim a b c = s * s) (x : K) : a*(x*x)+b*x+c=0 ↔ x=(-b+s)/(2a) ∨ x=(-b-s)/(2a); formalizes the quadratic formula/discriminant machinery central to the article, but not the function-as-object (graph, vertex) itself, so treated as related rather than exact.
Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Even.lean:57 — def IsSquare (a : α) : Prop := ∃ r, a = r * r; instantiated at ℕ this is literally the definition of a perfect/square number.

Mathlib/Algebra/Squarefree/Basic.lean:42 — def Squarefree [Monoid R] (r : R) : Prop := ∀ x, x*x ∣ r → IsUnit x; instantiated at ℤ/ℕ this is the square-free integer definition, with Nat-specific characterization Nat.squarefree_iff_nodup_primeFactorsList (Mathlib/Data/Nat/Squarefree.lean:34).
